claim: Evidence dispatch and router implementation comprehensively support boundary audit, evidence scope validation, and blocker generation for missing evidence and project mutations. All three agent roles (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) require path citations for project facts, and boundary violations directly block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Runtime converts boundary mutations and missing external evidence into blockers, then merges them into readiness.blockers[] and sets prd_ready=false.
evidence.why: Verifies that boundary violations and missing evidence directly prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Router validates evidence record scope and project paths, then generates blockers for missing or invalid evidence in projectEvidenceBlockingIssues().
evidence.why: Verifies that evidence validation enforces project path requirements for project facts.

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing() removes non-missing status text to prevent status notes from masking actual gaps.
evidence.why: Verifies that missing field validation keeps PRD blocked on unresolved evidence gaps.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() generates EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers when required evidence agents have not completed.
evidence.why: Verifies that missing agent results block PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Execution policy and agent prompt hard rules forbid project_mutation and restrict writes to output_dir only.
evidence.why: Verifies that evidence agent boundary is enforced by both policy and hard rules.

risks: Evidence agents might mutate project files via external tooling if provider tool permissions are misconfigured.
sanitizeMissing() regex patterns might misclassify complex status text as missing when it is actually informational.
Provider adapter bypassPermissions mode relies on agent compliance rather than technical enforcement.

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker results agree on all claims with no conflicts. Both provide proper project-scoped evidence with exact paths and line numbers. No assumptions promoted to facts. No unresolved missing data. All blockers are correctly reflected in demand state. Risks are documented but do not affect evidence validity. PRD readiness blockers (EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED for verifier) are appropriate and will be resolved by this result.
